Specialty (shown to customers)
Auto-accept ≥% of asking price
This is your default. Set a different threshold on any binder, case, or card from its settings — the most specific rule wins, and firm-priced cards never auto-accept.
Adds a "Check price on TCGplayer" link to card details so shoppers can verify market prices themselves. Never shown on graded cards.

Check for new Pokémon sets
